nasb.text: The remainder of the length alongside the holy allotment shall be 10,000 cubits toward the east and 10,000 toward the west; and it shall be alongside the holy allotment. And its produce shall be food for the workers of the city.

esv.text: The remainder of the length alongside the holy portion shall be 10,000 cubits to the east, and 10,000 to the west, and it shall be alongside the holy portion. Its produce shall be food for the workers of the city.

cnv.text: 這俗地兩旁剩下的地，沿著所獻的聖區的長度計算，東邊五公里，西邊五公里，也沿著所獻的聖區。這些地的出產要給城裡的工人作食物。

ccb.text: 与圣地相邻，城外东西两侧剩下的地各长五公里，地里的出产用来供应城内的工人。
